---
title: "EDA"
format: PDF
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
penn_crash <- read.table("PennCrash.txt", header = TRUE, quote = "\"", sep = "")

penn_crash
```

```{r}
# Example: Check the number of treated vs untreated sites
penn_crash %>% count(Treat)

# Example: Visualize the relationship between traffic volume (adt08) and crashes (tot08)
ggplot(penn_crash, aes(x = adt08, y = tot08, color = as.factor(Treat))) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Traffic Volume vs. Crashes in 2008",
       x = "AADT Volume (2008)",
       y = "Total Crashes (2008)",
       color = "Rumble Strip Installed")
```

```{r}
# 1. Clean the data: Convert treatment to a factor and clean column names if needed
penn_crash <- penn_crash %>%
  mutate(Treat = factor(Treat, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No Treatment", "Treatment")))

# 2. Reshape to long format for easier plotting
# This makes it easier to use 'year' as an axis in ggplot
crash_long <- penn_crash %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("tot"), 
               names_to = "year", 
               values_to = "crashes") %>%
  mutate(year = recode(year, "tot04" = 2004, "tot08" = 2008, "tot12" = 2012))

# 3. Create a boxplot of crashes by year and treatment
ggplot(crash_long, aes(x = factor(year), y = crashes, fill = Treat)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Crashes by Year and Treatment Status",
       x = "Year", y = "Total Crashes") +
  theme_minimal()
```
# Trend plot
```{r}
# Reshape the data to long format for time-series visualization
crash_long <- penn_crash %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("tot04", "tot08", "tot12"), 
               names_to = "year", 
               values_to = "crashes") %>%
  mutate(year = recode(year, "tot04" = 2004, "tot08" = 2008, "tot12" = 2012))

# Calculate mean crashes per year for each group
crash_summary <- crash_long %>%
  group_by(Treat, year) %>%
  summarise(mean_crashes = mean(crashes), .groups = 'drop')

# Plot the trend
ggplot(crash_summary, aes(x = factor(year), y = mean_crashes, color = Treat, group = Treat)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Mean Crash Counts Over Time",
       x = "Year", y = "Average Crashes",
       color = "Group") +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Correlation check
```{r}
# Visualize relationship for 2008 (pre-treatment state)
ggplot(penn_crash, aes(x = adt08, y = tot08, color = Treat)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Traffic Volume (2008) vs. Total Crashes (2008)",
       x = "Annual Average Daily Traffic (2008)", 
       y = "Total Crashes (2008)") +
  theme_minimal()
```
